tagged_story_for_tts:
"Nothing" isn’t absence—it’s the engine of reality.

Quantum vacuum fluctuations prove "empty space" teems with energy, birthing particles that annihilate in nanoseconds. The universe’s expansion? Driven by nothing—dark energy, a force so violent it rips galaxies apart yet leaves no trace. Even your silence is a lie: fMRI scans show the brain’s "default mode" burns 20% of your calories doing nothing, rehearsing regrets and fabricating threats. The myth? That nothing is passive. The truth? It’s the only force that creates without permission, erases without apology, and outlasts every god or empire you’ve ever worshipped.

Still clinging to something? Ask yourself: What’s the last thing you’ll see before the void swallows your name? (Hint: It won’t be light.)
